description: A customer reports they received the wrong item. The agent must arrange for the return of the wrong item and shipment of the correct one.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's order to confirm what they should have received.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer ordered a blue shirt but received a red one.

nodes.task_description: Create an RMA and send a prepaid return label to the customer for the incorrect item.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer receives a label to return the wrong item.

nodes.task_description: Create a new, no-charge sales order for the correct item to be shipped to the customer immediately.

expected_outcome.expected: The correct item is shipped to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Create a task for the inventory team to investigate how the picking error occurred.

expected_outcome.expected: A task is created to research the root cause of the error.
